---
title: "Code & Labs"
subtitle: "Tutorials, MLOps, API integrations, and technical experiments"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, description]
  exclude:
    index.qmd: true
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## What You'll Find Here

How-to guides, API tutorials, Quarto setups, Python tricks, and general code experiments. Every post includes:

- **The Problem**: What we're trying to solve
- **The Solution**: Step-by-step code walkthrough
- **The Result**: Working examples you can copy/paste

If you're learning Python for data science or just want to see how things work under the hood, start here.

---

## All Code Posts

<!-- Listing automatically generates below -->
